name: The Brave Little Explorer
art_style: soft watercolor children's book illustration, warm palette, gentle lighting

pages.text: {HERO_NAME} woke up at the edge of the {SETTING}, ready for a big adventure.
pages.image_prompt: {HERO} standing at the edge of a {SETTING}, soft morning light, curious expression

pages.text: Along the way, {HERO_NAME} met a friendly {SIDEKICK} who became a loyal friend.
pages.image_prompt: {HERO} meeting a friendly {SIDEKICK} in the {SETTING}, warm and joyful

pages.text: Together they faced a tricky problem, and {HERO_NAME} felt a little scared.
pages.image_prompt: {HERO} and a {SIDEKICK} facing a challenge in the {SETTING}, dramatic but gentle

pages.text: By being brave, {HERO_NAME} learned the power of {VALUE}.
pages.image_prompt: {HERO} smiling proudly in the {SETTING} with a {SIDEKICK}, triumphant glow
